name: IGH_locus_chr14
description: Immunoglobulin heavy chain locus on chr14q32.33, ~1.25 Mb spanning V-D-J-C clusters in proximal-to-distal order on the minus strand: ~50 functional VH genes (and ~80 pseudogenes), 23 DH segments, 6 JH segments, then the constant region with IGHM, IGHD, IGHG3, IGHG1, IGHA1, IGHGP (pseudogene), IGHG2, IGHG4, IGHE, IGHA2. The four IGHG paralogs share 90-95% intra-cluster identity and require paralog-specific variants (PSVs) for copy assignment. CHM13 carries a duplicated IGHG4 paralog absent from the GRCh38 primary haplotype. Somatic VDJ recombination and class-switch recombination produce structural heterogeneity even within a single B cell.
expected_copy_count: 1 per haplotype but heterogeneous due to VDJ rearrangement and isotype class-switching; IGHG4 carries an additional duplicate copy on CHM13
